title: dichapetalaceae
intro: The rank Dichapetalaceae refers to a family of flowering plants, specifically a group of plants that are closely related and share similar characteristics. It is a taxonomic classification that groups together plants that have distinct features such as leaf and flower morphology. Dichapetalaceae is a relatively small family of plants, with approximately 70 species spread across 8 genera. This family is native to tropical and subtropical regions around the world, including Africa, Asia, and the Pacific Islands.
